channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-17066] lod_xattr_set()) ASSERTION( (!!(!strcmp(name, "lustre.""lov") || !strcmp(name, "trusted.lov")) == !!(!lod_dt_obj(dt)->ldo_comp_cached)) ) failed
item.description:
Adding additional racer test https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/41368 surfaced the following crash:

[16104.408588] LustreError: 4168:0:(lod_object.c:5136:lod_xattr_set()) ASSERTION( (!!(!strcmp(name, "lustre.""lov") || !strcmp(name, "trusted.lov")) == !!(!lod_dt_obj(dt)->ldo_comp_cached)) ) failed: 
[16104.411561] LustreError: 4168:0:(lod_object.c:5136:lod_xattr_set()) LBUG
[16104.412125] Pid: 4168, comm: mdt_rdpg01_003 3.10.0-7.9-debug #2 SMP Tue Feb 1 18:17:58 EST 2022
[16104.413146] Call Trace:
[16104.413633] [<0>] libcfs_call_trace+0x90/0xf0 [libcfs]
[16104.414162] [<0>] lbug_with_loc+0x4c/0xa0 [libcfs]
[16104.414692] [<0>] lod_xattr_set+0x1b13/0x1c90 [lod]
[16104.415221] [<0>] mdo_xattr_set+0xc0/0x4c0 [mdd]
[16104.415746] [<0>] mdd_xattr_set+0xf85/0x1200 [mdd]
[16104.416279] [<0>] mo_xattr_set+0x43/0x45 [mdt]
[16104.416812] [<0>] mdt_close_handle_layouts+0x9a4/0xee0 [mdt]
[16104.417358] [<0>] mdt_mfd_close+0x5b2/0xbb0 [mdt]
[16104.417887] [<0>] mdt_close_internal+0xb4/0x240 [mdt]
[16104.418532] [<0>] mdt_close+0x28c/0x970 [mdt]
[16104.419217] [<0>] tgt_request_handle+0x88e/0x19b0 [ptlrpc]
[16104.419815] [<0>] ptlrpc_server_handle_request+0x251/0xc00 [ptlrpc]
[16104.420555] [<0>] ptlrpc_main+0xc66/0x1670 [ptlrpc]
[16104.421185] [<0>] kthread+0xe4/0xf0
[16104.422327] [<0>] ret_from_fork_nospec_begin+0x7/0x21
[16104.422934] [<0>] 0xfffffffffffffffe
[16104.423456] Kernel panic - not syncing: LBUG

Crashdump: http://testing.linuxhacker.ru/lustre-reports/external/crashes/boilpot-bigmem-65-2023-08-25-15:53:21/

Intresting that the same assertion in the same place was previously seen mid-2021 as part of https://review.whamcloud.com/44178 testing in sanity-flr and hot-pool tests: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/de728c9c-b9dd-4c65-b898-507df9215560

Here's the tracker for this crash that lists all matching failures: https://knox.linuxhacker.ru/crashdb_ui_external.py.cgi?newid=6580

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: ok great - so let's close this ticket as a duplicate unless new evidence comes to light
the problem described here seem to be the same as in LU-17048 and, I'd hope, have been fixed by that patch.

I hit this LBUG on the latest master build #4510 when try to fix an error in sanity test_184d when system is set with PFL layout(LU-16904). core dump can be found on trevis

[root@trevis-88vm2 10.240.43.81-2024-03-19-22:21:34]# pwd
/scratch/dumps/trevis-88vm2.trevis.whamcloud.com/10.240.43.81-2024-03-19-22:21:34

Did several times of "lfs swap_layouts" with no issue and then remove the PFL layout from files and dirs and try to do the swap_layouts again when the crash happened on MDS

[root@trevis-88vm4 tests]# lfs setstripe --component-del -I 2 /mnt/lustre/tdir/f2
[root@trevis-88vm4 tests]# lfs getstripe -I /mnt/lustre/tdir/f2
1

[root@trevis-88vm4 tests]# lfs setstripe --component-del -I 1 /mnt/lustre/tdir/f2
[root@trevis-88vm4 tests]# lfs getstripe /mnt/lustre/tdir/f1
/mnt/lustre/tdir/f1 has no stripe info
[root@trevis-88vm4 tests]# lfs getstripe /mnt/lustre/tdir/f2
/mnt/lustre/tdir/f2 has no stripe info
[root@trevis-88vm4 tests]# ls /mnt/lustre/tdir/
f1  f2
[root@trevis-88vm4 tests]# lfs getstripe /mnt/lustre/tdir/
/mnt/lustre/tdir/
  lcm_layout_gen:    0
  lcm_mirror_count:  1
  lcm_entry_count:   2
    lcme_id:             N/A
    lcme_mirror_id:      N/A
    lcme_flags:          0
    lcme_extent.e_start: 0
    lcme_extent.e_end:   1048576
      stripe_count:  1       stripe_size:   4194304       pattern:       raid0       stripe_offset: -1

    lcme_id:             N/A
    lcme_mirror_id:      N/A
    lcme_flags:          0
    lcme_extent.e_start: 1048576
    lcme_extent.e_end:   EOF
      stripe_count:  1       stripe_size:   4194304       pattern:       raid0       stripe_offset: -1

/mnt/lustre/tdir//f1 has no stripe info
/mnt/lustre/tdir//f2 has no stripe info
[root@trevis-88vm4 tests]# lfs setstripe -d /mnt/lustre/tdir/
[root@trevis-88vm4 tests]# lfs getstripe /mnt/lustre/tdir/
/mnt/lustre/tdir/
  lcm_layout_gen:    0
  lcm_mirror_count:  1
  lcm_entry_count:   2
    lcme_id:             N/A
    lcme_mirror_id:      N/A
    lcme_flags:          0
    lcme_extent.e_start: 0
    lcme_extent.e_end:   1048576
      stripe_count:  1       stripe_size:   4194304       pattern:       raid0       stripe_offset: -1

    lcme_id:             N/A
    lcme_mirror_id:      N/A
    lcme_flags:          0
    lcme_extent.e_start: 1048576
    lcme_extent.e_end:   EOF
      stripe_count:  1       stripe_size:   4194304       pattern:       raid0       stripe_offset: -1

/mnt/lustre/tdir//f1 has no stripe info
/mnt/lustre/tdir//f2 has no stripe info
[root@trevis-88vm4 tests]# lfs setstripe -d /mnt/lustre/
[root@trevis-88vm4 tests]# lfs getstripe /mnt/lustre/
/mnt/lustre/
stripe_count:  1 stripe_size:   4194304 pattern:       0 stripe_offset: -1

/mnt/lustre//tdir
stripe_count:  1 stripe_size:   4194304 pattern:       0 stripe_offset: -1

[root@trevis-88vm4 tests]# touch /mnt/lustre/tdir/f1
[root@trevis-88vm4 tests]# lfs getstripe /mnt/lustre/tdir/f1
/mnt/lustre/tdir/f1
lmm_stripe_count:  1
lmm_stripe_size:   4194304
lmm_pattern:       raid0
lmm_layout_gen:    0
lmm_stripe_offset: 1
	obdidx		 objid		 objid		 group
	     1	            14	          0xe	   0x280000400

[root@trevis-88vm4 tests]# ./openfile -f O_CREAT:O_LOV_DELAY_CREATE /mnt/lustre/tdir/f2
Succeed in opening file "/mnt/lustre/tdir/f2"(flags=O_CREAT)
[root@trevis-88vm4 tests]# lfs getstripe /mnt/lustre/tdir/f2
/mnt/lustre/tdir/f2 has no stripe info
[root@trevis-88vm4 tests]# lfs swap_layouts /mnt/lustre/tdir/f1 /mnt/lustre/tdir/f2

"Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/53113
Subject: LU-17066 tests: reproducer
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: fbcff6be03f5e30e1811cf5790d52cc8daed69dd
it's a race between migrate (which takes LAYOUT bit) and unlink (which does not). the migrate drops cached layout, but a racing unlink reloads it back.
